calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Continued To Apr-14-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Scott Myers for petitioner Roscoe Howard Jr. (via Zoom).

Mr. Myers stated that the primary asset of the estate is in New York, that the decedent had ownership interest in a co-op apartment in New York, that they found several checks that need to be re-issued, and that the only asset in California is around $10,000.00. He also said that once the matter is resolved in California then they can terminate the estate matter and proceed in New York.

The matter is continued to April 14, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Evan Winet for administrator Roscoe C. Howard, Jr. (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Report of Status of Administration, Request for Extension of Time to Administer Estate, and Request for Waiver of Filing Inventory and Appraisal.

Mr. Winet explained that the decedent died in San Francisco but owned a co-op apartment in New York, which was her primary asset. He reported that access to the New York property had been delayed while clearing title issues under a recently issued ancillary decree, no California assets had yet been identified, but that investigation remained ongoing.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant in part, extending the time to administer the estate to August 19, 2026, and deny the request for waiver of inventory and appraisal, noting that the existence of California assets had not been conclusively ruled out.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Myers appeared by zoom for Roscoe Howard, Jr. (administrator).

Mr. Myers stated that the certification was filed this morning. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated August 31, 2023 is admitted to probate. Roscoe C. Howard, Jr. is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond in the amount of $24,000.00 is required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 19, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Continued To Aug-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
